description: Regression baseline after thermo-nuclear refactor: release gates live in src/manuscript/output_gates/ and registry_facts.py (counted in src/ coverage). Refreshed by `uv run python scripts/regression_gate.py --update-baseline` on green runs.

tolerance.comment: Drift bounds applied between the previous green baseline and the current run. Test count may decrease by at most `test_count_drop_max`; coverage by at most `coverage_drop_pct_max` percentage points; invariant count and Lean budgets are absolute floors / ceilings (not tolerances).
